What we do

Make your vision a reality, right now. We help founders turn early ideas into products people remember by removing the fluff and distilling the good stuff.

Tell us about your idea

Product Design

Web Design

Branding

Print Design

Prototyping

Consultancy

Hear it from the ones who are thriving today.

We’ve helped loads of clients secure investments, move past the seed stage, break into new markets, and do more of what they love.

Worked with Stephen for years. The single best UX/UI and website designer I've ever had the pleasure to work with. Great value for money and great eye for detail.

Michael Blakley

Co-Founder

Stephen is excellent -- quality output, responsive, responsible, kind, and experienced. We were thrilled with the results.

Jonathan Holtby

Founder

Stephen has been exceptional to work with. He's incredibly creative, extremely responsive, and has always been eager to support our requirements as a business, while delivering a first class service!

Rob Green

Founder

We've worked with Stephen and team from the infancy of our business. The quality of the UX design and the genuine interest in our success from the McShannock team has resulted in many of our prospects and customers commenting specifically on the user experience and modern look of our products.

Chris Shannon

Co-Founder

Stephen is a great UI/UX designer - professional, creative, and incredibly easy to work with. He consistently delivered clean, intuitive designs. Highly recommended.

Dan Jelly

Co-Founder

Stephen is outstanding: proactive, quick to act, highly responsive to product feedback, inventive, and thorough. He has an excellent sense of modern design and UX, and you can fully trust his expertise and advice. I'm definitely going to continue working with him in the future.

Peter Karkkainen

Software Engineer

Great service from McShannock Design. Understood the design brief, created clean and simple, accessible designs, as requested.

Theo Smith

Founder

I worked with McShannock Design on UI/UX concepts taking my own rough wireframes transforming them into Figma, while transforming the design / UI. The work was flawless, delivered ahead of schedule and within budget. I highly recommend working with them.

Ben Brown

Founder

Stephen is a fantastic designer! He worked with us for a few years! He brings your vision to life. Recommended service provider to any founder.

Joe Lewin

Founder

Limited runway. Rapid iteration. Investor scrutiny. We’re made for founders who just need to get to the point.

Unlimited Design

A senior designer embedded in your team on a simple monthly flat rate. We plug into your Slack, your sprints, and your roadmap so you can keep shipping.

Start a project

Fixed Scope Projects

One-off fixed scope projects for when you need something done properly. Ideal for companies seeking investment or creating a POC. Strategic, all-in-one design for lasting brand impact.

Start a project

Vision to Venture

Everything you need to go from idea to investor-ready. Brand, product design, website, and pitch support. Built lean for early-stage founders with tight resources.

Learn more

Founder Referrals

Know someone who’d benefit from working with us? Refer a friend and earn up to £500 when they become a client. It’s our way of saying thanks for spreading the word.

stephen@mcshannock.co.uk

Insights

News, views, and real-life lessons in UX design.

See what we have to say

The Importance of Blog Posts for SEO

If you are a website owner, you have probably heard of the term SEO or search engine optimisation. SEO is the process of optimising your website to rank higher on search engine results pages (SERPs) and drive more traffic to your website.

Top Ten Figma Plugins to Boost Workflow

Figma is a great design tool already, but with the help of plugins, it can become even more powerful. In this post, we’ll be exploring the top ten Figma plugins that can help boost your workflow.

Why I Prefer to Use Figma Instead of Adobe XD

As a designer, the tools I use are crucial to my workflow. After trying out both XD and Figma, I have found that Figma is my preferred design tool for several reasons.

Less process, more progress.

Ready when you are

At McShannock Design, we partner with ambitious companies that know great design fuels faster growth.
